title: Record: 11L Tight SWA + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + XSA4 (val_bpb: 1.1270)
body:
## Record: 11L + Tight SWA + Partial RoPE + LN Scale + XSA4

**val_bpb: 1.1270** (3-seed mean, sliding window stride=64) | **15.5 MB** | 8xH100 SXM, 600s

### Key Innovation: Tight SWA

SWA checkpoint collection restricted to scale<0.2 (last ~600 steps), every 50 steps (~12 checkpoints). Eliminates SWA quality penalty (post-SWA BPB = pre-SWA BPB) while maintaining quantization-friendly weight averaging.

### Results (3 seeds)

| Seed | Steps | Sliding BPB (s64) | Artifact |
|------|-------|-------------------|----------|
| 1337 | 7,094 | 1.1268 | 15.50 MB |
| **42** | **7,099** | **1.1265** | **15.47 MB** |
| 7 | 7,099 | 1.1277 | 15.48 MB |

**Mean: 1.1270 | Std: 0.0006**

### Architecture

- 11L, 512d, 8H/4KV, MLP 3x relu-squared
- XSA on last 4 layers, Partial RoPE (16/64 dims), LN Scale
- SmearGate + BigramHash(2048) + OrthoInit
- Int6 per-row + zstd-22, FlashAttention 3 (Hopper)
- Muon WD=0.04, LR=0.025, batch 786K, seq 2048
